hero.title: Your Website Should Sell While You Sleep
hero.subtitle: We design ultra-fast web platforms and custom booking automation modules that convert traffic into revenue, eliminate manual scheduling, and boost B2B ROI. Tailored for restaurants, STOs, and medical clinics.

about.title: High-Conversion Architecture
about.desc: A client visits your site and instantly desires your service. We achieve this by combining Apple-grade glassmorphism with Next.js Edge networks, delivering sub-100ms load times and seamless user onboarding. We explicitly extend our high-performance engineering and automation coverage across Montenegro (Tivat, Budva, Podgorica), Serbia (Belgrade), and Albania (Tirana).

pricing.title: Commercial Directives
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, high-conversion engineering packages focused on business ROI.

tier1.title: Entry / Kickstart
tier1.desc: Premium, speed-optimized storefronts designed to capture immediate traffic. For local SMB and rental services. Best for: local bistros and emerging clinics wanting an elite digital card. Business impact: Captures 98% of mobile attention. ROI payback: Instantly offsets costs by converting the first 5-10 digital clients.

tier2.title: Growth / Business
tier2.desc: Interactive web platforms with custom booking engines and CRM sync. For local SMB and rental services. Best for: busy STOs, cafes, and medical hubs. Business impact: Saves 15+ hours of manual scheduling weekly. ROI payback: Fully recovers initial capital within 30-45 days through zero double-bookings.

tier3.title: Enterprise Architecture
tier3.desc: Custom infrastructure integrations, extreme API speed optimization, and security hardening. Ideal for premium hotels and restaurants. Best for: multisite service brands and high-volume operations. Business impact: Eliminates human coordination errors completely. ROI payback: Realized via massive overhead reduction in under 90 days.

leak.title: Losing Clients While You're Not Looking?
leak.subtitle: Slow load speeds and manual coordination are leaking your revenue.
leak.text: Every second of delay on your website drops conversion rates by 20%. While your competitors lose high-value prospects to sluggish page loads, your managers are stuck manually typing time-slots in WhatsApp, leading to double-bookings and lost opportunities. We replace this operational chaos with sub-100ms Edge networks and autonomous automation engines that secure bookings instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear insights into our engineering workflows, timeframes, and localized operations.

items.a: We build with Next.js 14 (App Router) and Tailwind CSS, leveraging Vercel Edge networks to deliver sub-100ms load times. For database and custom pipelines, we integrate PostgreSQL, Redis, and secure Webhook systems.

items.q: What is the production timeline for custom business automation modules?
items.a: Standard table reservation, appointment booking, or time-slot schedulers are typically deployed within 2-4 weeks. Enterprise-scale system automation and backend integrations take between 6-8 weeks.

items.q: Do you provide localized tech-support for companies in Montenegro, Serbia, and Albania?
items.a: Yes, we provide dedicated remote and on-site support for companies in Montenegro (Tivat, Budva, Podgorica), Serbia (Belgrade), and Albania (Tirana) with SLA response times under 2 hours.

cookie.text: We use essential cookies to measure performance and optimize load times. By utilizing Corebit Studio, you acknowledge our policies.

reviews.title: Client Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Decisions backed by metrics, direct revenue growth, and robust automation ROI.
reviews.form_success: Thank you! Your review has been submitted for moderation and will appear on the site after verification.
reviews.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

items.author: Marko J., Managing Director
items.text: Before switching to Corebit Studio, we were losing up to 20% of evening bookings due to the slow loading of our old website on mobile devices during peak season. The team built an instant booking system for us. The site speed is now astonishing, and the multi-language support has helped attract tourists from Western Europe. Full payback in the first month.

items.author: Elena R., Owner
items.text: We were looking for a local agency that understands the specifics of the hotel business on the Adriatic. Corebit Studio created not just a beautiful landing page, but a complete digital infrastructure integrated with our internal PMS. Direct bookings through the website bypassing aggregators grew by 35%.

items.author: Christophe B., Marketing Director
items.text: For our business, it is critical that clients can easily send inquiries in one click. The Corebit developers integrated secure forms and a smart profit calculator. Now we get clean, verified leads directly to our corporate email without spam. Highly recommended as a reliable IT partner.

items.author: Anja V., Operations Director
items.text: Automation saved our customer service. Thanks to Corebit Studio, the integration of procedure schedules and specialists went seamlessly. The site is fully responsive, runs fast on 4G, and the interface is intuitive even for elderly guests.

items.author: Thomas M., Co-founder
items.text: We collaborate under an agile software development model. The Corebit Systems team and their studio unit handle highly complex integration tasks for multinational financial aggregators. Exceptional technical expertise, scalable code (Next.js), and strict deadline compliance.

speed_check.title: Test Your Website Speed

speed_check.result_text: Your current website is loading too slowly. According to Google Core Web Vitals, you are losing up to 40% of mobile traffic and bookings. Our standard for hospitality and premium B2B businesses is under 1.5 seconds.
